name_en: Premium Hardware Original Leather, Calfskin Hobo Bag ~ Black
name_cn:
Premium Hardware Original Leather, Calfskin Hobo Bag ~ Black
This Hobo bag showcases classic charm while expressing a vibrant and versatile modern style. Embossed letter logo accents the iconic brand style, while the lining adds exquisite details.
Dimensions: W42×H42×10cm
Number: 5BC134
